pull.title: Small Tile N BlockScaled GEMM + Grouped GEMM on SM12x
pull.body: This MR adds support for BlockScaled GEMM and Grouped GEMM with tile size N = 32 and 64 for RTX and DGX Spark GPUs (SM120 and SM121). These tile sizes are best used when computing $Out^T = Weight^T Act^T$ for decode.

repo.name: cutlass
repo.description: CUDA Templates for Linear Algebra Subroutines

repo.name: cutlass
repo.description: CUDA Templates and Python DSLs for High-Performance Linear Algebra

-  /// Perform a collective-scoped matrix multiply-accumulate

   template <
     class FrgTensorC
   >
@@ -627,6 +625,27 @@ struct CollectiveMma<
       int thread_idx,
       TensorStorage& shared_tensors,
       Params const& mainloop_params) {
+
+      auto empty_tuple = make_tuple(_0{}, _0{}, _0{}, _0{});
+      mma(pipeline, smem_pipe_read, accum, k_tile_count,
+          thread_idx, shared_tensors, mainloop_params, empty_tuple);
+    }
+
+  /// Perform a collective-scoped matrix multiply-accumulate
+  /// Consumer Perspective
+  template <
+    class FrgTensorC,
+    class BlockCoord
+  >
+  CUTLASS_DEVICE void
+  mma(MainloopPipeline pipeline,
+      PipelineState smem_pipe_read,
+      FrgTensorC& accum,
+      int k_tile_count,
+      int thread_idx,
+      TensorStorage& shared_tensors,
+      Params const& mainloop_params,
+      [[maybe_unused]] BlockCoord& blk_crd) {
     using namespace cute;
 
     static_assert(is_rmem<FrgTensorC>::value, "C tensor must be rmem resident.");

@@ -545,8 +545,6 @@ struct CollectiveMma<
     }
   }
 
-  /// Perform a collective-scoped matrix multiply-accumulate
-  /// Consumer Perspective
   template <
     class FrgTensorC
   >
@@ -558,6 +556,25 @@ struct CollectiveMma<
       int thread_idx,
       TensorStorage& shared_tensors,
       Params const& mainloop_params) {
+    auto empty_tuple = make_tuple(_0{}, _0{}, _0{}, _0{});
+    mma(pipeline, smem_pipe_read, accum, k_tile_count, thread_idx, shared_tensors, mainloop_params, empty_tuple);
+  }
+
+  /// Perform a collective-scoped matrix multiply-accumulate
+  /// Consumer Perspective
+  template <
+    class FrgTensorC,
+    class BlockCoord
+  >
+  CUTLASS_DEVICE void
+  mma(MainloopPipeline pipeline,
+      PipelineState smem_pipe_read,
+      FrgTensorC& accum,
+      int k_tile_count,
+      int thread_idx,
+      TensorStorage& shared_tensors,
+      Params const& mainloop_params,
+      [[maybe_unused]] BlockCoord& blk_crd) {
     using namespace cute;
 
     static_assert(is_rmem<FrgTensorC>::value, "C tensor must be rmem resident.");

@@ -786,15 +786,29 @@ class GemmUniversal<
         // MSVC CTAD breaks if we say "Tensor" here, so we use "auto" instead.
         auto accumulators = partition_fragment_C(tiled_mma, take<0,2>(blk_shape));                 // (MMA,MMA_M,MMA_N)
         if (TileScheduler::valid_warpgroup_in_work_tile(work_tile_info)) {
-          collective_mainloop.mma(

-            accumulators,
-            work_k_tile_count,
-            mma_thread_idx,
-            shared_storage.tensors.mainloop,
-            params.mainloop

+          if constexpr (IsSm120Family) {

+          else {
+            collective_mainloop.mma(
+              mainloop_pipeline,
+              mainloop_pipe_consumer_state,

+              work_k_tile_count,
+              mma_thread_idx,

+              params.mainloop

+          }
 
           // Make sure the math instructions are done and free buffers before entering the epilogue
           collective_mainloop.mma_tail(

@@ -849,15 +849,29 @@ class GemmUniversal<
         // Order two Math WG's MMA one after the other, helps hide Epilogue
         math_wg_order_barrier.wait();
 
-        collective_mainloop.mma(

-          mainloop_pipe_consumer_state,
-          accumulators,
-          k_tile_count,

+        if constexpr (IsSm120Family) {
+          collective_mainloop.mma(
+            mainloop_pipeline,
+            mainloop_pipe_consumer_state,
+            accumulators,
+            k_tile_count,
+            warp_group_thread_idx,
+            shared_storage.tensors.mainloop,
+            params.mainloop,
+            blk_coord
+          );
+        }
+        else {
+          collective_mainloop.mma(
+            mainloop_pipeline,
+            mainloop_pipe_consumer_state,
+            accumulators,
+            k_tile_count,
+            warp_group_thread_idx,
+            shared_storage.tensors.mainloop,
+            params.mainloop
+          );
+        }
 
         // Cue for next Math WG's MMA to start
         math_wg_order_barrier.arrive();
